title: Yaar Solli Kadhal lyrics Pathinaaru Songs Lyrics
stanzas:
Singer: Yuvan Shankar Raja
Song: Yaar Solli Kadhal
Lyrics : Snehan
Movie Name : Pathinaaru

Yaar Solli Kadhal varuvadhu
Yaar Solli Kadhal povadhu
Yaaruku adimai indha kadhal
Yen indha kalam nagarudhu
Yen indha kadhal thagarudhu
Yen indha marupatta thedal

Idhayangal..ilayum tharunam therindhal solvai
Imaimoodi...irundhaaley velicham varuma solvai
Boomi luluka kadhal iruka engu odi olikirai
Boomi thanda vazhiye illai vaa..
Kadhal ingae thavaru endral
Kadavul kooda thavaru-than
Kadhal indri kadavul illai va

Unnai ne yen vadhaikirai
Karanangal theriyamal
Kadhal thane meendum unnai
Meetu edukkum
Ennai ne yen verrukirai
En nilami puriyamal
Kadhal unnai mounamaga azhugavaikum

Thedhi pol kadhalai neeyum
kilithuvida mudiyaadhey
Agaayathia ullangaiyil
Maraithu vaika mudiyaadhey
Kadhaluku maattru, edhuvum illaye
Aadai pola kalati poda
Mudiyavillai unnai naan
Uyirai-pola ennakul ullai va
Ennai meeri unnai edhuvum
Seidhidadhu kadhal thaan
Kadhalai-than nambukinren nan

Idhayathil ne kadhalai pootvaika mudyadhey
Savi endhu karathil iruku purindhu kolvaaiva
Vai-vazhiyil ne ennai thaan vendam endru sonnalum
Unnai orunaal undhan maname kondru-vidume

Neyum nanum serndhe seidhom
kadhal ennum sirpathai
Sirpam vendam endre neeyum
Thodanginai uthdhathai
Idhu enna niyayam neeye soladi
Innum 100 thalaimuraigal idha mannil vazhume
Andrum indha kadhal irukum vaa
Uyirgal janitha nodiyil-irundhu
Kadhal indae vazhudhe
Kadhal indri uyirgal edhu va

Yaar Solli Kadhal varuvadhu
Yaar Solli Kadhal povadhu
Yaaruku adimai indha kadhal
Yen indha kalam nagarudhu
Yen indha kadhal thagarudhu
Yen indha marupatta thedal

Idhayangal..ilayum tharunam therindhal solvai
Imaimoodi...irundhaaley velicham varuma solvai
Boomi luluka kadhal iruka engu odi olikirai
Boomi thanda vazhiye illai vaa..
Kadhal ingae thavaru endral
Kadavul kooda thavaru-than
Kadhal indri kadavul illai va

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song 'Yaar Solli Kadhal'?

The song explores themes of love and longing, expressing the complexities of romantic relationships.

What is the context of this song in the movie 'Pathinaaru'?

In Pathinaaru, the song reflects the emotional struggles of the characters as they navigate their love lives.

Who is the singer and music director of 'Yaar Solli Kadhal'?

The song is sung and composed by Yuvan Shankar Raja, known for his unique musical style.

When was 'Yaar Solli Kadhal' released?

The song was released on December 25, 2010.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Yaar Solli Kadhal, the protagonist reflects on the bittersweet nature of love, encapsulating feelings of yearning and hope. The song's soothing melody, combined with Yuvan's heartfelt vocals, creates an atmosphere of nostalgia and romance. As part of the movie Pathinaaru, it serves as a poignant reminder of the emotional rollercoaster that love often brings. This track resonates with anyone who has ever faced the trials of love, making it a timeless piece.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Yaar Solli Kadhal from the movie Pathinaaru is a mesmerizing romantic ballad that beautifully captures the essence of love and longing. With Yuvan's soulful voice and Snehan's poignant lyrics, this song resonates deeply with anyone who has experienced the highs and lows of love. Dive into this enchanting melody that promises to tug at your heartstrings.
stanzaMeanings: Who says love comes? Who says love goes? This love is a slave to someone. Why is this time so strange? Why is this love so difficult? Why is this search so different?

Hearts... if youth understands, it will speak. If it stays like this... will light come? Where is love in this world? It runs away. There is no way given by the earth. If love goes wrong, even God goes wrong. Without love, there is no God.
Why do I call you? Without knowing the reasons, love will again take you back. Why do I call you? Without understanding this land, love will cry silently for you.

Searching for love, you cannot let it go. In the sky, you cannot hide it. For love, there is nothing else. Like a dress, it cannot be removed. I cannot live without you. You are my life. Whatever I do, it is only love. I believe in love.
In my heart, love cannot be planted. What is the meaning of death? Even if you say you don't want me, your heart will still hold on to me.

We both have done this love, which is a skill. You say you don't want a sculpture. You started this. What is this justice? You tell me. There are still 100 paths in this world. And this love will exist. From the moment life is born, love is the way to live. Without love, what is life?
Who says love comes? Who says love goes? This love is a slave to someone. Why is this time so strange? Why is this love so difficult? Why is this search so different?

Hearts... if youth understands, it will speak. If it stays like this... will light come? Where is love in this world? It runs away. There is no way given by the earth. If love goes wrong, even God goes wrong. Without love, there is no God.
